narrative.intro: A direct attack on your ship, while docked in port. They must have distracted starport security. Now you have to fight for your life!
narrative.briefing: Set up the battlefield as a starport with crates, boxes, machinery, vehicles scattered everywhere. Your crew sets up within 5" of your battlefield edge. You may include Sick Bay crew (marked Impaired). Two enemy groups: first at 18", second arrives Round 3.
narrative.completion_win: You drove off both groups. +1 XP to every character still on field. Roll twice for Battlefield Finds. Remove any one Rival. No new Rival check.
narrative.completion_lose: You fled or entire crew became casualties. Ship suffers 1D6+10 Hull Points damage.

deployment.crew_special: May include Sick Bay crew as Impaired (can fight, no Dash/Aim)
deployment.enemy_setup_group_1: 18" from crew positions in rough line, 2" between figures
deployment.enemy_setup_group_2: arrives Round 3 from battlefield edge behind group 1

enemies.description: Roll twice on the Hired Muscle Subtable, generate each force separately. Even if same type rolled twice, keep as two separate forces.

bail_rules.check_method: Roll 2D6. If roll <= casualties taken by that group, they flee.

primary.description: Drive off both enemy groups or force them to flee

end_conditions: Both groups driven off or fled

hold_field.description: Reputation gained: remove any one Rival
